page_content:
UNIV104 Reading and Writing at the College Level (1 Credit)

A workshop designed to enhance students’ college level reading and writing abilities to include study skills and strategies for success. Restriction: Must be in uTerp Individual Admits program.

UNIV106 The Transfer Student in the University (1 Credit)

This course is designed to assist students in making a successful transition to the University of Maryland (UMD) and to serve as an extended orientation to campus living and learning.

Restriction: Must be a first-semester transfer student.
